description: Users are unhappy with the high brokerage charges and lack of transparency in the Groww app, which is affecting their trading experience and overall returns. They are seeking improvements in this area to make the app more user-friendly and affordable.
quotes: even we take one lot also taken high brokerage charges..be safe all. if you earn 1000 grow app share 400.
The final charges were much higher than anticipated, and I did not clearly understand the full cost before executing the trade.
action_ideas: Review and adjust the brokerage charge structure to be more competitive and transparent
Implement a clear and prominent display of all fees and charges before order confirmation to avoid surprises

description: Users are expressing frustration with the Groww app's performance, customer support, and trading issues, leading to financial losses and a lack of trust in the platform. The app's glitches, delays, and inconsistent order execution are causing significant problems for users.
quotes: Worst customer service. My groww app logged out automatically. Most vulnerable app.
They are modifying rules too frequently and seems Groww is performing internal profit booking from the users based on TGT and auto squareoffs by triggering and too incorrect prices..
I am extremely disappointed with the Grow app. It is a stock broker, but when I added 100 rupees, I had a 20 rupee loss, which, due to the broker’s fault, escalated to an 800 rupee loss.
action_ideas: Improve the app's stability and performance to prevent glitches and delays
Enhance customer support by providing timely and effective assistance to users
Review and refine the app's trading rules and order execution processes to prevent financial losses

description: Users are expressing frustration with the Groww app due to technical issues, hidden charges, and poor customer support. They are experiencing losses and difficulties with transactions, leading to a loss of trust in the app.
quotes: Worst app for trading. You set the sell target at 100 with profit and it will automatically execute it at 95 and bear loss.
Pathetic app with totally useless customer service. They could not do the onboarding even after almost a week, always blaming the bank and everything but themselves.
The app is riddled with glitches and faults. Furthermore, they do not even answer the helpline number when needed. They also tamper with the account.
action_ideas: Conduct a thorough review of the app's technical infrastructure to identify and fix glitches and faults.
Implement a more transparent and user-friendly fee structure to avoid hidden charges and surprises for users.
Enhance customer support by providing multiple channels of communication, such as phone, email, and chat, and ensure that support agents are knowledgeable and empowered to resolve issues efficiently.

description: Users are experiencing difficulties with the app's user interface, citing issues with navigation, display, and functionality. They are requesting improvements to the app's design and features to enhance their overall experience.
quotes: Holding stock view sort options should include profit and loss in terms of amount high to low.
The whole app has been ruined, after the April day by day changes, Today's High Low & 52 weeks High Low showing same
The latest update has completely messed up the scaling on the Stocks tab.
action_ideas: Conduct a thorough review of the app's UI and make necessary adjustments to improve navigation and display
Add features such as customizable watchlists, sorting options, and detailed stock information to enhance user experience
Restore previous UI features that users found useful, such as the display of indices and sector information

description: Users praise the Groww app for its simplicity and ease of use, making it perfect for beginners and experienced investors alike. The app's clean interface and smooth transactions have made investing easy and hassle-free.
quotes: Very easy to use for investment in individual stocks and Mutual funds.
Groww has made investing so simple and hassle-free.
one of the best trading apps for beginners, and now equally great for professional traders.
action_ideas: Continue to simplify and streamline the app's interface to improve user experience
Expand the app's features to cater to more advanced investors while maintaining its user-friendly nature

description: Users are experiencing various issues with the Groww app, including lagging, crashing, and incorrect order execution. These issues are resulting in financial losses and frustration for the users.
quotes: yesterday I lost 4k because of App. Reason: when I am trying to navigate app got stuck for few seconds i tried clicking 2 or 3 times and after few seconds it got responded and result is my shares got soldout at 1 rupees lesser than market price
even after trying to sell my shares for about 5 times applyng the tpin and otp its showing error which is frustrating
Current update is worst...The app flicker constantly and I can't exit the trade i have taken
action_ideas: Optimize the app's performance to reduce lagging and crashing issues
Implement a more robust order execution system to prevent incorrect or delayed executions
Provide more detailed error messages to help users troubleshoot issues

description: Users are experiencing various technical issues with the Groww app, including incorrect data, glitches, and crashes, which are affecting their trading decisions and overall experience. These issues are causing frustration and disappointment among users.
quotes: After the latest update, the app isn't working properly. Today's high and today's low prices are showing incorrect data.
No stability. They change layout at will which affect trading flow.
The latest update has a critical bug where refreshing live data causes the app to crash completely.
action_ideas: Conduct thorough testing of the app before releasing updates to ensure stability and accuracy of data
Revert to a previous stable version of the app until the issues are resolved
Provide timely and effective customer support to address user concerns and issues
